entries.details: Checked-in solution requires Skyfield EarthSatellite/itrf_xyz propagation, but neither skyfield nor sgp4 is available in the verification runtime; a mean-motion-only rewrite does not reproduce the requested method.

Checked-in solution requires the NRLMSISE-00 pyatmos/astropy stack, which is absent from the verification runtime; the raw-data candidate also references omni2_low_res/omni2.txt while the local specification file is named omni2.text.

Checked-in solution requires cdflib to read SW_OPER_ACCACAL_2__20240511T000000_20240511T235959_0304.cdf; cdflib/netCDF/h5py are absent from the verification runtime, so the CDF-backed acceleration series cannot be independently verified.
Candidate and checked-in solution require ZHVI.csv, but it is absent from other-benchmarks/Kramabench/data/wildfire/input and no matching local Kramabench file was found.

Checked-in solution requires geopandas/shapely-style GeoPackage polygon intersection. Available verification runtimes lack geopandas, fiona, pyogrio, shapely, ogrinfo, and ogr2ogr, so the spatial join cannot be independently executed from the raw usa.gpkg and nifc_geographic_areas.gpkg files.

Checked-in solution requires geopandas/shapely-style GeoPackage polygon intersection. Available verification runtimes lack geopandas, fiona, pyogrio, shapely, ogrinfo, and ogr2ogr, so the spatial join cannot be independently executed from the raw usa.gpkg and nifc_geographic_areas.gpkg files.

The local NOAA regression can be computed, but it does not support the candidate answer: manual OLS with HC3 robust errors on noaa_wildfires.csv gives significant negative duration coefficients and significant positive prim_threatened_aggregate coefficients for Full Suppression indicators, contradicting the provided conclusion.

Candidate and checked-in solution require WeatherEvents_Jan2016-Dec2022.csv, but no matching WeatherEvents file exists under other-benchmarks/Kramabench/data/wildfire/input or the local Kramabench tree.
